case_title: STEVEN MINCHEN VS. REDLANDS COMMUNITY HOSPITAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MINCHEN, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT REDLANDS COMMUNITY HOSPITAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FILED CHALLENGE TO VENUE. FILED BY DEFENDANT REDLANDS COMMUNITY HOSPITAL AS TO PLAINTIFF MINCHEN, STEVEN
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/17/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MINCHEN, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT REDLANDS COMMUNITY HOSPITAL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS SUSTAINED. PLAINTIFF STEVEN MINCHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REDLANDS COMMUNITY HOSPITAL IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIEL EKSTROM, DIRECTOR OF RISK MANAGMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
